route_note: src/index.ts:1469 AUGMENTS the computeStats PerformanceStats with asset_count/exchange_count/hold_rate/holdsByTier/shadow_venue_count/timeframe_count/totalHolds AND FILTERS byExchange/byTimeframe to promoted venues (index.ts:1500/1521). All of this is derived from the PerformanceStats object, so it is FLAG-INDEPENDENT: byte-equivalence is gated on PerformanceStats (computeStats vs rollupStats); the route's augmentation+filtering applies identically to both paths → /api/performance-public stays byte-identical post-flip.

anchors_at_capture.note: anchor VALUES move with new signals each cache bucket; the KEY SET + forbidden_keys are the stable contract. The exact byte-identity is the CH2 live-probe gate (both paths on one snapshot); CH3 R3.2 compares canonical pre/post on a warmed bucket.

drift_check_command: host curl http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/performance-public | jq 'keys' must equal allowed_top_keys; recentSignals[] must match none of forbidden_keys_recentSignals (PII LAW); byExchange/byAsset key counts must not DECREASE (no-data-loss gate).
